message:
cleanup(core,fuse): remove debug output and fix clippy lints

- Removed debug eprintln block in ext4_unlink_impl that dumped parent
  extents and block contents on lookup failure. Replaced verbose match
  with clean let...else per clippy::manual_let_else.

- Removed debug eprintln in FUSE fallocate handler that logged raw
  mode bits on every call.

- Fixed _cx underscore prefix in btrfs_setattr — parameter is now
  used by btrfs_remove_overlapping_extent_data (added by concurrent
  agent's truncation fix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
